verdict.label: Marginal
verdict.headline: Lagide Lunch
verdict.reason: There is a possible lunch window at Lagide, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Lagide looks like a fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 113 kJ, 9 s period, consistent 77/100, and wind is the main risk.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · 0.6-1.1 m · 113 kJ · 9 s period · wind is the main risk · Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 92 kJ, 9 s period, consistent 78/100, and wind is the main risk.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is a sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent · 0.6-1.1 m · 92 kJ · 9 s period · wind is the main risk · Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a fun-sized window: 0.6-1.1 m, 121 kJ, 9 s period, consistent 77/100, and wind is the main risk.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is an inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay · 0.6-1.1 m · 121 kJ · 9 s period · wind is the main risk · Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Baleal looks like a small window: 0.3-0.6 m, 66 kJ, 9 s period, consistent 78/100, and wind is the main risk.  A broad, forgiving beach setup with several peaks; this is best for spreading out and finding a manageable wave when the bay has enough push.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot.
ranked.shortExplanation: Baleal is a broad, forgiving beach setup with several peaks · 0.3-0.6 m · 66 kJ · 9 s period · wind is the main risk · Watch: spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot.
